# ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal

> One call. Problem solved. Peace restored.

ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal is a family-run pest control and wildlife removal company serving Metro Atlanta, Georgia. The business is operated by Ray, Nehemiah, and Chaz.

## Services

- Wildlife Removal: Humane removal of raccoons, squirrels, bats, snakes, opossums, and birds.
- Pest Control: Treatment for rats, mice, roaches, ants, termites, and general household pests.
- Exclusion Services: Permanent sealing of entry points to prevent wildlife and pest re-entry.
- Disinfection & Cleanup: Professional cleaning of droppings, urine, and nesting materials.
- Dead Animal Removal: Safe removal, proper disposal, and odor elimination.
- Commercial Services: Discreet pest and wildlife management for businesses.

## 4-Step Process

1. Inspect: Thorough property examination to identify pests and entry points.
2. Trap: Humane, effective capture and removal of wildlife or pest elimination.
3. Exclude: Seal every entry point to prevent return.
4. Disinfect: Clean and sanitize affected areas.

## Contact

- Phone: (770) 691-3636
- Email: info@wildliferemovalasap.com
- Address: 2990 Pine Canyon Dr. SW Unit 11, Atlanta, GA 30331
- Hours: Monday-Saturday, 24 hours. Closed Sunday.
- Website: https://asap-pest-wildlife.pages.dev

## Service Area

Metro Atlanta including Atlanta, East Point, College Park, Decatur, Marietta, Smyrna, Roswell, Alpharetta, Sandy Springs, Kennesaw, Lithonia, Stone Mountain, Lawrenceville, Duluth, Peachtree City, Stockbridge, McDonough, and Conyers.

## Licensing

- Georgia Department of Natural Resources
- Georgia Department of Agriculture
